name: Orbital Velocity Calculator
description: Compute the circular orbital velocity around a body.
formulaDescription: Circular orbital velocity is based on the gravitational parameter and orbit radius.

example.explanation: A low Earth orbit at ~200 km altitude has an orbital speed of about 7.75 km/s.

faqs.question: What is the difference between orbital and escape velocity?
faqs.answer: Orbital velocity keeps an object in orbit; escape velocity is the speed needed to leave the gravitational field entirely.
